meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Fixing Slow Dev with User Onboarding
content.seo_description: Stop slow development cycles. Learn how to implement strategic user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to speed up your freelance delivery.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, decouple your onboarding flow from core business logic. Use Antigravity for rapid UI scaffolding and Claude Code for automated state management. This modular approach reduces technical debt, accelerates client delivery, and ensures your onboarding experiences are professional, repeatable, and easily scalable across multiple SaaS projects.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank IDE, the client deadline is breathing down your neck, and your codebase feels like a tangled knot of legacy spaghetti. Every feature request feels like a monumental struggle against the friction of your own architecture. This isn't just a lack of coffee; it's a structural failure in how you handle user lifecycle management.

True velocity isn't about typing faster; it's about building smarter primitives. By mastering high-fidelity user onboarding, you shift from 'coding features' to 'orchestrating workflows.' This guide will show you how to leverage AI-driven tooling to dismantle that friction, turning your development process into a high-speed, automated engine that impresses clients and triples your shipping speed.

steps.title: Architecting the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Define the user journey state machine before touching code. This ensures transitions between onboarding steps are predictable and bug-free.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a state machine schema for a 4-step SaaS onboarding flow including 'welcome', 'profile-setup', 'feature-tour', and 'dashboard-activation'. Use TypeScript interfaces.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a state machine hook in React using the generated schema to manage onboarding persistence.'

steps.title: Scaffolding UI with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate clean, accessible UI components for your onboarding modals, ensuring a consistent look and feel across different client brands.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a reusable onboarding modal component using Tailwind CSS and Radix UI. Include slots for progress tracking and skip buttons.

steps.title: Automating Data Persistence
steps.description: Bind your onboarding state to a database or local storage to ensure users never lose progress if they refresh the browser.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Supabase integration service that saves the current onboarding step to the user profile table in real-time.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement a useOnboarding hook that syncs local state with the Supabase database.'

steps.title: Implementing Context-Aware Tooltips
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject context-aware tooltips that guide users through complex dashboard features without cluttering the UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a tooltip trigger component that only displays if the user has not completed the onboarding sequence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add tooltip logic to the Dashboard component using the onboarding context.'

steps.title: Performance Optimization & Testing
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding flow doesn't impact core app load times by implementing lazy loading for onboarding assets.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Optimize the onboarding component bundle by wrapping the onboarding logic in React.lazy and Suspense.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Run a performance audit on the onboarding flow and suggest code-splitting strategies.'

pro_tips: Always build onboarding as a 'feature flag' toggle—this allows you to disable or swap flows instantly for A/B testing without code redeploys.
Use a 'Skip for Now' persistent flag; forcing onboarding is the fastest way to lose users, regardless of how great your code is.
Map your onboarding steps to specific database triggers to automatically unlock features once a user completes a set of tasks.
Treat your onboarding flow as a separate micro-module; it should have zero dependencies on your main application business logic to avoid circular imports.
Use AI to generate mock data for your onboarding flow tests, simulating different user personas to ensure the UI handles edge cases gracefully.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, focus on building an 'Analytics Hook' to track at which step users drop off, then use Claude Code to iterate on those specific friction points.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the code and start orchestrating your success. By automating your onboarding, you reclaim hours of billable time and deliver a premium experience that keeps clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
